sentence_reviews.text: AutoML treats preprocessing, model choice, hyperparameters, data policy, or architecture as a design space optimized by an automated controller.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Elsken et al. 2018 arXiv abstract: automated architecture search methods categorized by search space, search strategy, and performance estimation; AIMA contents: learning and optimization/search background.
sentence_reviews.notes: The NAS source directly supports automated architecture search, but preprocessing/model choice/data policy are broader AutoML claims not directly inspected.

sentence_reviews.text: It replaces ad hoc trial-and-error with reproducible search under a declared objective, budget, and constraint set.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Elsken et al. 2018 arXiv abstract: manual architecture development is time-consuming/error-prone; NAS categorized by search space, search strategy, performance estimation strategy.
sentence_reviews.notes: The source supports automated search replacing manual design; objective/budget/constraints are reasonable synthesis but not exact abstract claims.

sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Elsken et al. 2018 abstract: architecture search strategy/performance estimation; AIMA contents: optimization and learning chapters.
sentence_reviews.notes: Hyperparameter optimization is standard AutoML, but not directly evidenced by the inspected NAS abstract.

sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Elsken et al. 2018 abstract: search space/search strategy framing for NAS; AIMA contents: ML system development/model selection not directly inspected.
sentence_reviews.notes: Pipeline search is broader than NAS and not directly supported by inspected source text.

sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Elsken et al. 2018 abstract: automated neural architecture search; no hardware-aware passage inspected.
sentence_reviews.notes: Architecture design is supported; hardware-aware specialization is not directly supported by inspected evidence.

sentence_reviews.text: Results are limited by the search space, proxy metric, compute budget, and validation leakage.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Elsken et al. 2018 abstract: categorizes NAS by search space, search strategy, and performance estimation strategy.
sentence_reviews.notes: Search space and performance estimation are supported; compute budget and validation leakage are plausible but not directly inspected.

sentence_reviews.text: AutoML & automated model design uses Optimization theory as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Elsken et al. 2018 abstract: automated architecture search and search strategy; AIMA contents: optimization/search and learning chapters.
sentence_reviews.notes: Automated search over architectures directly supports optimization as a core ingredient.

sentence_reviews.text: AutoML & automated model design follows the learning setup expressed by Active learning & curriculum learning.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: AIMA contents: learning chapters; no inspected source connects active/curriculum learning to AutoML.
sentence_reviews.notes: No adequate support for this dependency relationship.

sentence_reviews.text: AutoML & automated model design follows the learning setup expressed by Evolutionary, swarm & population-based learning.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Elsken et al. 2018 arXiv page: NAS survey with cs.NE subject classification; abstract categorizes search strategies.
sentence_reviews.notes: Evolutionary NAS is supported as a search-strategy family, but AutoML does not generally 'follow' evolutionary learning; relationship type should likely be uses/optional/common method.

sentence_reviews.text: AutoML & automated model design follows the learning setup expressed by Meta-learning.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Elsken et al. 2018 abstract: automated NAS; no meta-learning passage inspected.
sentence_reviews.notes: The inspected source does not support meta-learning as the setup.

edge_reviews.notes: Automated search over design spaces directly supports a core uses dependency on optimization.
No inspected evidence supports active/curriculum learning as a common ingredient for AutoML.
Evolutionary methods are plausible/common NAS search strategies, but trained_under is not the narrowest relationship type.
No inspected evidence supports this as a common trained_under edge.
